description_long: This is a high-tech, hard-shell briefcase with a rugged, angular design and reinforced corners, primarily colored in white and black. The case opens to reveal a sophisticated electronic interface, including a large display screen with a digital map and control panel, suggesting it is used for specialized technical or security purposes. The interior features various buttons, switches, and ports, as well as a connected cable, indicating advanced functionality. The exterior is robust, with a prominent handle on top for easy carrying and a visible brand logo labeled 'ATEQ' on the back. The case appears to be constructed from durable plastic or composite materials, with metallic accents for added strength. Its overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for urban environments where secure and portable technology is required.
description: A rugged, high-tech briefcase with a digital interface and reinforced corners, featuring a display screen and control panel inside. The exterior is white and black with a sturdy handle and a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open briefcase with a large digital display, control panel, and visible internal electronics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the open case and the thickness of the lid and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back of the briefcase with the 'ATEQ' brand logo prominently centered.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open configuration and the connection between the lid and base.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed rectangular handle made of hard plastic, attached to the top center of the briefcase with molded mounts.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two visible latches on the front edge of the case, likely snap or clasp type, securing the lid to the base.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular brand logo with the text 'ATEQ' and a geometric emblem is visible on the back exterior panel.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Black plastic or rubberized corner reinforcements, angular in shape, covering all corners for impact protection.
